required_fields.label: Company name
required_fields.placeholder: Full legal entity name or proposed name

required_fields.label: Industry / sector
required_fields.placeholder: e.g., B2B SaaS, Healthcare Services, E-commerce

required_fields.label: Business description
required_fields.placeholder: Describe what your company does or will do in 2-3 sentences...

required_fields.label: Target market
required_fields.placeholder: Who are your customers? Describe your ideal customer profile and market segments...

required_fields.label: Revenue model
required_fields.placeholder: How does/will the business make money? Describe pricing, channels, and revenue streams...

required_fields.label: Competitive advantage
required_fields.placeholder: What differentiates you from competitors? What is your unfair advantage or moat?

required_fields.label: Current stage and funding needs
required_fields.placeholder: e.g., Pre-revenue seeking $500K seed, Series A with $2M ARR seeking $10M...

required_fields.label: Founding / management team
required_fields.placeholder: Key team members, their roles, and relevant experience...

optional_fields.label: Key traction metrics
optional_fields.placeholder: Growth rates, retention, LTV, CAC, or other key metrics...

optional_fields.label: Geographic focus
optional_fields.placeholder: e.g., US initially, expanding to Europe in Year 2

optional_fields.label: Regulatory or licensing requirements
optional_fields.placeholder: Any regulations, licenses, or certifications required...

file_upload_prompts.label: Upload financial statements, projections, or models
Upload market research, competitor analysis, or pitch decks

sections.label: Executive Summary
sections.instructions: Comprehensive overview of the entire business plan. Must stand alone as a complete briefing covering problem, solution, market, model, team, financials, and ask.

sections.label: Company Overview
sections.instructions: Company history, mission, vision, legal structure, location, and current stage. Include key milestones achieved to date.

sections.label: Market Analysis
sections.instructions: Total addressable market (TAM), serviceable addressable market (SAM), serviceable obtainable market (SOM) with data sources. Industry trends and growth drivers.

sections.label: Competitive Landscape
sections.instructions: Direct and indirect competitors, their strengths and weaknesses, and your differentiated positioning. Include competitive matrix.

sections.label: Products and Services
sections.instructions: Detailed description of offerings, value proposition, development roadmap, and intellectual property position.

sections.label: Marketing and Sales Strategy
sections.instructions: Go-to-market strategy, customer acquisition channels, sales process, pricing strategy, and key partnerships.

sections.label: Operations Plan
sections.instructions: Operational workflow, technology infrastructure, supply chain (if applicable), key vendors, and scaling plan.

sections.label: Management Team
sections.instructions: Detailed bios of key team members, relevant experience, advisory board, and key hires planned.

sections.label: Financial Projections
sections.instructions: Revenue projections, expense breakdown, P&L, cash flow, and break-even analysis with clearly stated assumptions. Include 3-5 year projections.

sections.label: Funding Requirements
sections.instructions: Amount sought, use of funds breakdown, proposed terms or valuation expectations, and path to next milestone.

sections.label: Risk Analysis
sections.instructions: Key risks to the business including market, execution, regulatory, and financial risks with mitigation strategies.

sections.label: Appendices
sections.instructions: Supporting materials including detailed financial models, market research data, letters of intent, patents, and team resumes.
